response.step_by_step_log: I analyzed the video and identified it as a 3-song medley performed by Hololive's 3rd generation. I used the audio to identify the songs: "Ahoy!! Warera Houshou KaizokudanвҳҶ" by Houshou Marine, "Zenryoku-Jumping!" by Shiranui Flare, and "Lyrical Monster" by Shirogane Noel. I used DuckDuckGo to search for their lyrics and translation. The search queries used were: "Ahoy!! Warera Houshou KaizokudanвҳҶ Japanese and English lyrics", "Zenryoku-Jumping! Japanese and English lyrics", and "Lyrical Monster Japanese and English lyrics".
response.global_summary: A 3-song medley performance by Hololive's 3rd Generation (Houshou Marine, Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel) featuring "Ahoy!! Warera Houshou KaizokudanвҳҶ", "Zenryoku-Jumping!", and "Lyrical Monster".

scenes.description: The performance begins with "Ahoy!! Warera Houshou KaizokudanвҳҶ".
